Notice And Motion For Order Compelling Production Of Plaintiff Medical Records From Dr. Angela Leung Pursuant To Subpoena And Compelling Dr. Angela Leung Attendance At Deposition; And Sanctions; Memorandum In Support; And Declaration Of Alan Law
Off Calendar Jan-20-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS FEDERAL EXPRESS CORPORATION, CHRISTOPHER ARAGON'S MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING PRODUCTION OF PLAINTIFF MEDICAL RECORDS FROM DR. ANGELA LEUNG PURSUANT TO SUBPOENA AND COMPELLING DR. ANGELA LEUNG ATTENDANCE AT DEPOSITION; AND SANCTIONS.

No appearances. Those who have not made an appearance are deemed to have stipulated to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: No opposition filed; motion granted. Dr. Leung shall produced all responsive documents and appear at a deposition no later than Friday, January 27, 2017. Sanctions of $250 awarded to Defendant Federal Express. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported
